+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",

+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "dapr: State Store Query API",
+    "description": "State Store Query API. Requested by 9+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current dapr deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your dapr version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dapr\nhelm list -n dapr 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working dapr installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review dapr configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant dapr configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dapr\nkubectl get configmap -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=dapr\n```\n## In what area(s)?\r\r\n\n## Describe the proposal\nThis proposal is a follow-up on #1339 \n\nThis is a proposed design of the API for querying the **state store**."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for State Store Query API",
+        "description": "I actually do use parametrized query in `CosmosDB` implementation of the visitor interface.\nTake a look at the function `setNextParameter`:\n\n```go\nfunc (q *Query) setNextParameter(val string) string {\n\tpname := fmt.Sprintf(\"%d__\", len(q.query.Parameters))\n\tq.query.Parameters =\n```yaml\nHere is an example of the query request JSON body:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n dapr -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dapr\nkubectl get events -n dapr --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"State Store Query API\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I actually do use parametrized query in `CosmosDB` implementation of the visitor interface.\nTake a look at the function `setNextParameter`:\n\n```go\nfunc (q *Query) setNextParameter(val string) string {\n\tpname := fmt.Sprintf(\"%d__\", len(q.query.Parameters))\n\tq.query.Parameters = append(q.query.Parameters, documentdb.Parameter{Name: pname, Value: val})\n\n\treturn pname\n}\n```",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Here is an example of the query request JSON body:",
+        "A sample implementation might look like that:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
